template.name: Zabs
template.description: Returns the absolute value of the given number.

template.name: ZaddButton
template.description: Adds a button component to the bot's response.

template.name: ZaddCmdReactions
template.description: Immediately adds one or more emoji reactions to the message that triggered the command.

template.name: ZaddEmoji
template.description: Downloads an image from the given URL and creates a new custom emoji in the current server, optionally returning the usable emoji string.

template.name: ZaddField
template.description: Adds a named field with a value to the specified embed slot, with an optional inline layout flag.

template.name: ZaddMentionableSelect
template.description: Adds a mentionable select menu (users and roles) component to the bot's response.

template.name: ZaddMessageReactions
template.description: Adds one or more emoji reactions to a specific message in the specified channel.

template.name: ZaddReactions
template.description: Queues one or more emoji reactions to be added to the bot's own response message after it is sent.

template.name: ZaddRoleSelect
template.description: Adds a role select menu component to the bot's response.

template.name: ZaddSelectMenuOption
template.description: Adds an option to the current string select menu.

template.name: ZaddTextInput
template.description: Adds a text input field to the current modal.

template.name: ZaddUserSelect
template.description: Adds a user select menu component to the bot's response.

template.name: ZafkChannelID
template.description: Returns the ID of the AFK voice channel in the current guild, or an empty string if none is configured.

template.name: ZafkTimeout
template.description: Returns the AFK timeout in seconds configured for the guild.

template.name: Zalias
template.description: Registers an alias that substitutes and evaluates the stored AST node when called. Aliases are local to the command execution.

template.name: ZallMembersCount
template.description: Returns the total combined member count across all guilds the bot is currently in.

template.name: ZallowRoleMentions
template.description: Restricts role pings in the bot response to only the listed role IDs; if no IDs are given, all role mentions are suppressed.

template.name: ZallowUserMentions
template.description: Restricts user pings in the bot response to only the listed user IDs; if no IDs are given, all user mentions are suppressed.

template.name: ZappEmojiCreate
template.description: Creates a new application emoji from an image URL. Returns the emoji ID.

template.name: ZappEmojiDelete
template.description: Deletes an application emoji by ID.

template.name: ZappEmojis
template.description: Lists the bot application's emojis as a JSON array.

template.name: ZargCount
template.description: Returns the number of space-separated words in the text.

template.name: ZargsCheck
template.description: Halts execution with an error if the number of whitespace-separated arguments in the message is outside the allowed range.

template.name: Zasync
template.description: Spawns a named background task that runs the provided code block concurrently.

template.name: ZauditCount
template.description: Fetches the guild audit log and returns the number of returned entries.

template.name: ZauditEntries
template.description: Fetches the latest guild audit log entries and returns them as a JSON array.

template.name: ZauditEntryAction
template.description: Returns the action name for the selected audit log entry.

template.name: ZauditEntryChanges
template.description: Returns the change details for the selected audit log entry as JSON.

template.name: ZauditEntryID
template.description: Returns the audit log entry ID for the selected entry.

template.name: ZauditEntryReason
template.description: Returns the reason attached to the selected audit log entry.

template.name: ZauditEntryTarget
template.description: Returns the target ID for the selected audit log entry.

template.name: ZauditEntryUser
template.description: Returns the user ID of the actor who created the selected audit log entry.

template.name: ZauditLatest
template.description: Fetches the most recent guild audit log entry and returns it as a JSON object.

template.name: Zauthor
template.description: Sets the author name on the specified embed slot.

template.name: ZauthorIcon
template.description: Sets the author icon image URL on the specified embed slot, requiring an author to already be set.

template.name: ZauthorURL
template.description: Sets a hyperlink URL on the embed's author name, requiring an author to already be set.

template.name: ZautomodRule
template.description: Returns information about a specific automod rule in the guild as JSON.

template.name: ZautomodRuleCreate
template.description: Creates a new automod rule. trigger and actions are JSON strings.

template.name: ZautomodRuleDelete
template.description: Deletes an automod rule from the guild.

template.name: ZautomodRuleEdit
template.description: Edits an existing automod rule. Use !unchanged for fields to skip.

template.name: ZautomodRules
template.description: Lists all automod rules in the guild as a JSON array.

template.name: ZautomodRuleUpdate
template.description: Edits an existing automod rule. Use !unchanged for fields to skip.

template.name: Zawait
template.description: Blocks execution until the specified background task completes and returns its output.

template.name: Zban
template.description: Bans a user from the guild with an optional reason and optional number of days of messages to delete.

template.name: Zbase64Decode
template.description: Decodes a base64-encoded string and returns the decoded text.

template.name: Zbase64Encode
template.description: Encodes text to base64.

template.name: ZblackListIDs
template.description: Halts command execution if the triggering user's ID matches any of the provided user IDs.

template.name: ZblackListRoles
template.description: Halts command execution if the triggering user holds any role matching the provided role names.

template.name: ZblackListRolesIDs
template.description: Halts command execution if the triggering user holds any role matching the provided role IDs.

template.name: ZblackListServers
template.description: Halts command execution if the current server's guild ID matches any of the provided guild IDs.

template.name: ZblackListUsers
template.description: Halts command execution if the triggering user's username matches any of the provided usernames.

template.name: ZboostCount
template.description: Returns the number of active Nitro boosts the guild has received.

template.name: ZboostLevel
template.description: Returns the current Nitro boost tier of the current guild as a number from 0 to 3.

template.name: ZbotCommands
template.description: Returns an alphabetically sorted list of all loaded command triggers, joined by the specified separator.

template.name: ZbotID
template.description: Returns the bot's own user ID.

template.name: ZbotOwnerID
template.description: Returns the user ID of the bot application's owner.

template.name: ZbotTyping
template.description: Broadcasts a typing indicator in the current channel.

template.name: ZbyteCount
template.description: Returns the number of UTF-8 bytes in the text.

template.name: Zcalculate
template.description: Evaluates a mathematical expression supporting +, -, *, /, %, and ** operators with parentheses and correct operator precedence.

template.name: ZcategoryChannels
template.description: Returns the channels inside a category sorted by position, formatted as names, IDs, mentions, or a count, joined by the specified separator.

template.name: ZcategoryCount
template.description: Returns the number of category channels in the guild.

template.name: ZcategoryID
template.description: Returns the snowflake ID of a category channel in the current guild matched by name.

template.name: Zceil
template.description: Returns the smallest integer greater than or equal to the given number.

template.name: ZchangeCooldownTime
template.description: Overrides the label words used when formatting remaining cooldown times.

template.name: ZchangeNickname
template.description: Changes the guild nickname of the command author or specified user; supports the %username% placeholder in the nickname string.

template.name: ZchannelCount
template.description: Returns the total number of channels in the current guild.

template.name: ZchannelCreated
template.description: Returns the Unix timestamp in seconds at which the channel was created, extracted from its snowflake ID.

template.name: ZchannelExists
template.description: Returns true if a channel with the given ID exists, or false otherwise.

template.name: ZchannelID
template.description: Returns the current channel's ID, or searches for and returns the ID of a guild channel matching the given name.

template.name: ZchannelInvites
template.description: Returns a space-separated list of invite codes for the given channel.

template.name: ZchannelName
template.description: Returns the name of a Discord channel by its ID, falling back to the current channel if no ID is provided.

template.name: ZchannelNames
template.description: Returns a sorted list of all channel names in the guild joined by the specified separator.

template.name: ZchannelPosition
template.description: Returns the position index of a channel within the guild's channel list.

template.name: ZchannelTopic
template.description: Returns the topic of a Discord text channel, or an empty string if none is set.

template.name: ZchannelType
template.description: Returns the type of a channel as a string such as text, voice, category, announcement, stage, forum, thread, or dm.

template.name: ZchannelWebhooks
template.description: Returns a space-separated list of webhook URLs configured for the given channel.

template.name: ZcharCount
template.description: Returns the number of Unicode characters in the text.

template.name: ZcheckCondition
template.description: Evaluates a condition expression and returns true or false.

template.name: ZcheckContains
template.description: Returns true if the text contains any of the provided words, using a case-insensitive comparison.

template.name: ZcheckUserPerms
template.description: Returns true if the specified user has all of the given guild permissions.

template.name: Zclear
template.description: Bulk-deletes up to 100 recent messages in the current channel, with an optional user filter and configurable handling of pinned messages.

template.name: ZclearReactions
template.description: Removes a specific emoji reaction from a message, or clears all reactions when !all is passed as the emoji.

template.name: Zcolor
template.description: Sets the accent color of the specified embed slot using a hex color code.

template.name: ZcolorRole
template.description: Sets the color of an existing role to the specified hex color code.

template.name: ZcommandName
template.description: Returns the name of the currently executing command, falling back to the trigger string if no command name is set.

template.name: ZcommandsCount
template.description: Returns the total number of commands loaded from the commands directory.

template.name: ZcommandTrigger
template.description: Returns the trigger string of the currently executing command.

template.name: Zcooldown
template.description: Applies a per-user per-server cooldown that blocks re-use of the current command until the duration expires.

template.name: ZcreateChannel
template.description: Creates a new channel in the current guild with the specified name, type, and optional parent category.

template.name: ZcreateEvent
template.description: Creates a new scheduled voice event in the server and returns its event ID.

template.name: ZcreateForumTag
template.description: Adds a new available tag to a forum channel with an optional emoji and moderation flag.

template.name: ZcreateInvite
template.description: Creates an invite for the specified channel and returns its code.

template.name: ZcreatePost
template.description: Creates a new forum post in a forum channel and returns its thread ID.

template.name: ZcreateRole
template.description: Creates a new role in the guild with the specified name and optional color, hoist, and mentionable settings.

template.name: ZcreationDate
template.description: Returns the creation date derived from any Discord snowflake ID, formatted according to the optional format string.

template.name: ZcropText
template.description: Crops text to a maximum number of characters and appends an ending string if the text was truncated.

template.name: ZcustomEmoji
template.description: Returns the usable Discord emoji string for a server custom emoji looked up by name.

template.name: ZcustomID
template.description: Returns the custom ID of the current interaction.

template.name: Zdate
template.description: Returns the current date in YYYY-MM-DD format using the active timezone.

template.name: Zday
template.description: Returns the current day of the month using the active timezone.

template.name: Zdeafen
template.description: Server-deafens the specified user so they cannot hear any audio in voice channels.

template.name: Zdefer
template.description: Defers the interaction response, showing a thinking indicator and extending the response window to 15 minutes.

template.name: Zdelay
template.description: Executes a block of code after a specified duration (e.g., 10s, 1m).

template.name: ZdeleteChannels
template.description: Deletes one or more channels by their IDs.

template.name: ZdeleteChannelsByName
template.description: Deletes all channels in the current guild whose names match any of the provided names.

template.name: ZdeleteEvent
template.description: Deletes a scheduled event from the current server by its event ID.

template.name: ZdeleteForumTag
template.description: Removes an available tag from a forum channel by its tag ID.

template.name: ZdeleteInvite
template.description: Deletes a Discord invite by its code.

template.name: ZdeleteMessage
template.description: Deletes the specified message from a channel.

template.name: ZdeleteRole
template.description: Permanently deletes the specified role from the guild.

template.name: ZdeleteSticker
template.description: Deletes a guild sticker from the current server by its sticker ID.

template.name: Zdescription
template.description: Sets the description text on the specified embed slot.

template.name: ZdisplayName
template.description: Returns the display name of the command author or specified user; use server for the guild nickname or global for the Discord global name.

template.name: Zdiv
template.description: Divides the first value by each subsequent divisor in sequence and returns the result.

template.name: Zdm
template.description: Sends a direct message with the specified content to the given user.

template.name: ZdmChannelID
template.description: Returns the ID of the DM channel between the bot and a user, creating it if it does not yet exist.

template.name: Zduration
template.description: Converts a duration string (e.g. 1h, 30m, 5d) into seconds.

template.name: ZeditButton
template.description: Edits a button on an existing message by its custom ID.

template.name: ZeditChannelPerms
template.description: Edits permission overwrites for a user or role on a channel, using + to allow, - to deny, and / to neutralize each named permission.

template.name: ZeditEvent
template.description: Edits one or more fields of an existing scheduled event by its ID.

template.name: ZeditForumTag
template.description: Edits the name or moderation flag of an existing forum tag by its ID.

template.name: ZeditMessage
template.description: Replaces the text content of an existing message in a channel.

template.name: ZeditSelectMenu
template.description: Edits the properties of a string select menu on an existing message.

template.name: ZeditSelectMenuOption
template.description: Replaces the options on an existing select menu with a single updated option.

template.name: ZeditSplitText
template.description: Replaces the element at the given 1-based index in the current split text with a new value.

template.name: ZeditThread
template.description: Edits one or more properties of an existing thread such as name, archived state, archive duration, lock status, and slowmode.

template.name: ZeditWelcomeScreen
template.description: Edits the guild's welcome screen settings.

template.name: ZemojiExists
template.description: Returns true if a custom emoji with the given ID exists in the current server, or false otherwise.

template.name: ZemojiName
template.description: Returns the name of a custom emoji in the current server looked up by its ID.

template.name: ZemoteCount
template.description: Returns the total number of custom emojis in the current server.

template.name: Zenabled
template.description: Halts command execution with an optional error message when the condition is false, or continues silently when it is true.

template.name: ZendsWith
template.description: Returns true if the text ends with the specified suffix.

template.name: Zentitlements
template.description: Returns the bot application's entitlements as a JSON array.

template.name: Zephemeral
template.description: Marks the current slash command response as ephemeral so it is only visible to the invoking user.

template.name: Zerror
template.description: Halts execution and displays a custom user-facing error message.

template.name: Zeval
template.description: Parses and executes a ZBR code string at runtime, returning the concatenated text output.

template.name: ZeventChannel
template.description: Returns the channel ID associated with a scheduled event, or an empty string for external events.

template.name: ZeventCount
template.description: Returns the total number of scheduled events in the current server.

template.name: ZeventDescription
template.description: Returns the description of a scheduled event by its event ID, or an empty string if no description is set.

template.name: ZeventEnd
template.description: Returns the end time of a scheduled event as a Unix timestamp string, or an empty string if no end time is set.

template.name: ZeventName
template.description: Returns the name of a scheduled event by its event ID.

template.name: ZeventStart
template.description: Returns the start time of a scheduled event as a Unix timestamp string.

template.name: ZeventStatus
template.description: Returns the current status of a scheduled event as one of: scheduled, active, completed, or cancelled.

template.name: ZeventSubscribers
template.description: Returns the number of users subscribed to a scheduled event.

template.name: ZexecutionTime
template.description: Returns the number of milliseconds elapsed since the current command began executing.

template.name: Zfloor
template.description: Returns the largest integer less than or equal to the given number.

template.name: Zfooter
template.description: Sets the footer text on the specified embed slot.

template.name: ZfooterIcon
template.description: Sets the footer icon image URL on the specified embed slot, requiring a footer to already be set.

template.name: ZforJson
template.description: Iterates over a JSON array at the given key path within the current parsed JSON object, executing the code block for each element.

template.name: ZforSplit
template.description: Iterates over the elements produced by a prior ZtextSplit call, executing the code block for each element with ZloopIndex and ZloopValue populated.

template.name: ZforumPostCount
template.description: Returns the number of currently active posts in a forum channel.

template.name: ZforumPostLock
template.description: Locks a forum post, preventing new replies.

template.name: ZforumPostPin
template.description: Pins a forum post to the top of the forum channel.

template.name: ZforumPosts
template.description: Returns a space-separated list of active post IDs in a forum channel.

template.name: ZforumTagEmoji
template.description: Returns the emoji associated with a forum tag.

template.name: ZforumTagID
template.description: Returns the ID of a forum tag matching the given name, or an empty string if not found.

template.name: ZforumTagModerated
template.description: Returns true if the specified forum tag is restricted to moderators, or false otherwise.

template.name: ZforumTags
template.description: Returns a space-separated list of available tag names in a forum channel.

template.name: ZfromTimestamp
template.description: Formats a Unix timestamp into a human-readable date/time string using the active timezone and the specified format.

template.name: ZgetAttachments
template.description: Returns attachment URLs from the triggering message joined by newlines, or the single URL at the specified 1-based index.

template.name: ZgetBanReason
template.description: Returns the ban reason for the specified user, optionally checked against a different guild.

template.name: ZgetChannelVar
template.description: Returns the value of a channel-scoped variable, defaulting to the current channel if not specified.

template.name: ZgetCooldown
template.description: Returns the remaining cooldown time in seconds for the current user and command.

template.name: ZgetEmbedData
template.description: Fetches the specified field from an embed on an existing Discord message, where type is one of title, description, footer, color, image, or timestamp.

template.name: ZgetMentionableSelectUserCount
template.description: Returns the number of users and roles selected in a mentionable select menu interaction.

template.name: ZgetMentionableSelectUserID
template.description: Returns the selected user or role ID at the given 1-based index from a mentionable select menu interaction.

template.name: ZgetMentionableSelectUserIDs
template.description: Returns all selected user and role IDs from a mentionable select menu interaction joined by the given separator.

template.name: ZgetMessage
template.description: Fetches the specified field from a Discord message, where type is one of content, authorID, username, or avatar.

template.name: ZgetReactions
template.description: Returns a separator-joined list of usernames of users who reacted to a specific message with the given emoji.

template.name: ZgetRoleSelectRoleCount
template.description: Returns the number of roles selected in a role select menu interaction.

template.name: ZgetRoleSelectRoleID
template.description: Returns the selected role ID at the given 1-based index from a role select menu interaction.

template.name: ZgetRoleSelectRoleIDs
template.description: Returns all selected role IDs from a role select menu interaction joined by the given separator.

template.name: ZgetServerVar
template.description: Returns the value of a server-scoped variable, defaulting to the current server if not specified.

template.name: ZgetSlowmode
template.description: Returns the slowmode rate limit in seconds for the given channel, or 0 if no slowmode is set.

template.name: ZgetTextSplitIndex
template.description: Returns the 1-based index of the first element in the split that matches the given value, or -1 if not found.

template.name: ZgetTextSplitLength
template.description: Returns the number of elements in the current split text.

template.name: ZgetTimestamp
template.description: Returns the current Unix timestamp in the specified unit: seconds (s), milliseconds (ms), or nanoseconds (ns).

template.name: ZgetUserSelectUserCount
template.description: Returns the number of users selected in a user select menu interaction.

template.name: ZgetUserSelectUserID
template.description: Returns the selected user ID at the given 1-based index from a user select menu interaction.

template.name: ZgetUserSelectUserIDs
template.description: Returns all selected user IDs from a user select menu interaction joined by the given separator.

template.name: ZgetUserVar
template.description: Returns the value of a user-scoped variable, defaulting to the current user and server if not specified.

template.name: ZgetVar
template.description: Returns the value of a global bot-wide variable by name.

template.name: ZglobalCooldown
template.description: Applies a per-user global cooldown across all servers, preventing the user from running the command until the duration expires.

template.name: ZguildBanner
template.description: Returns the banner URL of the guild, or an empty string if no banner is set.

template.name: ZguildExists
template.description: Returns true if a guild with the given ID is accessible by the bot, or false otherwise.

template.name: ZguildID
template.description: Returns the ID of the current guild.

template.name: ZhasRole
template.description: Returns true if the specified user currently has the given role.

template.name: ZhighestRole
template.description: Returns the ID of the highest-position role held by the specified user, defaulting to the author.

template.name: ZhighestRoleWithPerms
template.description: Returns the ID of the highest-position role in the guild that has all of the specified permissions.

template.name: Zhour
template.description: Returns the current hour using the active timezone.

template.name: ZhttpAddHeader
template.description: Adds a custom HTTP header by name and value that will be sent with all subsequent HTTP requests in the current execution.

template.name: ZhttpDelete
template.description: Sends an HTTP DELETE request to the specified URL with an optional request body and stores the response.

template.name: ZhttpGet
template.description: Sends an HTTP GET request to the specified URL and stores the response for access via ZhttpStatus and ZhttpResult.

template.name: ZhttpGetHeader
template.description: Returns the value of a custom HTTP header previously registered via ZhttpAddHeader, or an empty string if it does not exist.

template.name: ZhttpPatch
template.description: Sends an HTTP PATCH request to the specified URL with an optional request body and stores the response.

template.name: ZhttpPost
template.description: Sends an HTTP POST request to the specified URL with an optional request body and stores the response.

template.name: ZhttpPut
template.description: Sends an HTTP PUT request to the specified URL with an optional request body and stores the response.

template.name: ZhttpRemoveHeader
template.description: Removes a custom HTTP header previously set via ZhttpAddHeader so it is no longer sent with subsequent requests.

template.name: ZhttpResult
template.description: Returns the response body of the last HTTP request, optionally navigating into it as a JSON path where each argument is one level deeper.

template.name: ZhttpStatus
template.description: Returns the HTTP status code of the last HTTP request made in the current execution.

template.name: Zif
template.description: Evaluates a condition and returns the then-branch value if true, or the optional else-branch value if false.

template.name: ZignoreChannels
template.description: Halts execution if the current channel matches any of the provided channel IDs.

template.name: Zimage
template.description: Sets the large image URL on the specified embed slot.

template.name: ZindexOf
template.description: Returns the 1-based character position of the first occurrence of a search string in the text, or 0 if not found.

template.name: ZinputValue
template.description: Returns the submitted value of a modal text input field by its field ID.

template.name: ZinviteInfo
template.description: Returns a specific field of a Discord invite by its code, where type is one of uses, channel, creationDate, inviter, or isTemporary.

template.name: ZisAdmin
template.description: Returns true if the command author or specified user has the Administrator permission in the current guild, otherwise false.

template.name: ZisBanned
template.description: Returns true if the specified user is currently banned from the guild.

template.name: ZisBoolean
template.description: Returns true if the value is exactly the string true or false, otherwise returns false.

template.name: ZisBooster
template.description: Returns true if the command author or specified user is currently boosting the current guild, otherwise false.

template.name: ZisBot
template.description: Returns true if the command author or specified user is a bot account, otherwise false.

template.name: ZisEmojiAnimated
template.description: Returns true if the custom emoji with the given ID is animated, or false if it is static.

template.name: ZisHoisted
template.description: Returns true if the given role is displayed separately in the member list, defaulting to the author's top role if no ID is provided.

template.name: ZisInteger
template.description: Returns true if the value parses as a whole number with no decimal point, otherwise returns false.

template.name: ZisInVoice
template.description: Returns true if the specified user is currently connected to a voice channel, defaulting to the author.

template.name: ZisMentionable
template.description: Returns true if the given role can be mentioned by all users, defaulting to the author's top role if no ID is provided.

template.name: ZisMentioned
template.description: Returns true if the specified user is mentioned in the triggering message, defaulting to the command author.

template.name: ZisMessageEdited
template.description: Returns true or false for whether a message has been edited, or returns its edit timestamp when type is timestamp.

template.name: ZisModerator
template.description: Returns true if the command author or specified user has the Moderate Members permission in the current guild, otherwise false.

template.name: ZisNSFW
template.description: Returns true if the given channel is marked as NSFW, or false otherwise.

template.name: ZisNumber
template.description: Returns true if the value parses as any numeric value including decimals, otherwise returns false.

template.name: ZisSlash
template.description: Returns true if the current command was triggered as a slash command, otherwise returns false.

template.name: ZisTimedOut
template.description: Returns true if the specified user currently has an active communication timeout.

template.name: ZisUserDMEnabled
template.description: Returns true if a DM channel can be successfully opened with the command author or specified user, otherwise false.

template.name: ZisValidHex
template.description: Returns true if the value is a valid six-digit hex color code, otherwise returns false.

template.name: ZjoinSplitText
template.description: Joins all elements in the current split text into a single string using the given separator.

template.name: ZjsonArray
template.description: Creates an empty JSON array at the specified key path in the working JSON object.

template.name: ZjsonArrayAppend
template.description: Appends a value to the end of the array at the specified key path in the working JSON object.

template.name: ZjsonArrayCount
template.description: Returns the number of elements in the array at the specified key path in the working JSON object.

template.name: ZjsonArrayIndex
template.description: Returns the 0-based index of the first occurrence of a value in the array at the specified key path, or -1 if not found.

template.name: ZjsonArrayPop
template.description: Removes and returns the last element of the array at the specified key path in the working JSON object.

template.name: ZjsonArrayReverse
template.description: Reverses the array at the specified key path in the working JSON object in place.

template.name: ZjsonArrayShift
template.description: Removes and returns the first element of the array at the specified key path in the working JSON object.

template.name: ZjsonArraySort
template.description: Sorts the array at the specified key path in ascending order, comparing numbers numerically and other values lexicographically.

template.name: ZjsonArrayUnshift
template.description: Inserts a value at the beginning of the array at the specified key path in the working JSON object.

template.name: ZjsonClear
template.description: Clears the working JSON object, discarding all stored data for the current execution.

template.name: ZjsonExists
template.description: Returns true if the specified key path exists in the working JSON object, or false otherwise.

template.name: ZjsonGet
template.description: Returns the value at the specified key path in the working JSON object, returning an empty string if the path does not exist.

template.name: ZjsonJoinArray
template.description: Joins all elements of the array at the specified key path into a single string using the provided separator.

template.name: ZjsonParse
template.description: Parses a JSON string and stores it as the working JSON object for the current execution.

template.name: ZjsonPretty
template.description: Serializes the working JSON object to a pretty-printed JSON string using the specified number of spaces for indentation.

template.name: ZjsonSet
template.description: Sets a value at the specified key path in the working JSON object, automatically inferring the value type.

template.name: ZjsonStringify
template.description: Serializes the working JSON object to a compact JSON string.

template.name: ZjsonUnset
template.description: Removes the key at the specified path from the working JSON object.

template.name: Zkick
template.description: Kicks a user from the guild with an optional reason.

template.name: ZlastMessageID
template.description: Returns the ID of the last message sent in the given channel, or an empty string if none exists.

template.name: ZlastPinTimestamp
template.description: Returns the date of the most recently pinned message in the channel formatted as YYYY-MM-DD, or an empty string if no pins exist.

template.name: ZlinesCount
template.description: Returns the number of lines in the text, returning zero for an empty string.

template.name: ZlistVar
template.description: Returns all global variable names joined by the given separator.

template.name: ZloopIndex
template.description: Returns the current 1-based iteration index of the active loop, or 0 if called outside a loop.

template.name: ZloopValue
template.description: Returns the current element value of the active loop, or an empty string if called outside a loop.

template.name: Zlowercase
template.description: Converts all characters in the text to lowercase.

template.name: ZlowestRole
template.description: Returns the ID of the lowest-position non-everyone role held by the specified user, defaulting to the author.

template.name: ZlowestRoleWithPerms
template.description: Returns the ID of the lowest-position role in the guild that has all of the specified permissions.

template.name: Zmax
template.description: Returns the largest value among all provided numbers.

template.name: Zmd5
template.description: Returns the MD5 hash of the input text in hexadecimal.

template.name: ZmembersCount
template.description: Returns the total number of members in the guild, or the count filtered by presence status.

template.name: Zmentioned
template.description: Returns the user ID of the Nth mentioned user in the triggering message, optionally falling back to the author ID.

template.name: Zmessage
template.description: Returns the full message content after the command trigger, or the Nth space-separated word when an index is provided.

template.name: ZmessageID
template.description: Returns the ID of the message that triggered the current command execution.

template.name: ZmessageLink
template.description: Builds and returns a Discord jump URL for the specified message, using the current channel if no channel ID is provided.

template.name: Zmin
template.description: Returns the smallest value among all provided numbers.

template.name: Zminute
template.description: Returns the current minute using the active timezone.

template.name: ZmodifyChannel
template.description: Modifies one or more properties of an existing channel such as its name, topic, NSFW flag, position, and parent category.

template.name: ZmodifyRole
template.description: Modifies the name, color, hoist, and mentionable settings of an existing role, leaving any unspecified fields unchanged.

template.name: ZmodifyRolePerms
template.description: Adds or removes permissions from a role using prefixed operations where + grants, - denies, and / resets a permission.

template.name: Zmodulo
template.description: Returns the remainder of dividing the dividend by the divisor.

template.name: Zmonth
template.description: Returns the current month number using the active timezone.

template.name: Zmulti
template.description: Returns the product of all provided numbers.

template.name: Zmute
template.description: Server-mutes the specified user in all voice channels.

template.name: ZnewModal
template.description: Creates a modal dialog to collect text input from the user.

template.name: ZnewSelectMenu
template.description: Creates a string select menu on the bot's response.

template.name: Znot
template.description: Inverts a boolean value, returning false for true or 1, and true for anything else.

template.name: ZnumberSeparator
template.description: Formats a number string by inserting thousands separators, defaulting to a comma.

template.name: ZonlyAdmin
template.description: Halts execution unless the author has the Administrator permission in the guild.

template.name: ZonlyBotChannelPerms
template.description: Halts execution unless the bot has all of the specified permissions in the given channel.

template.name: ZonlyBotPerms
template.description: Halts execution unless the bot has all of the specified guild permissions.

template.name: ZonlyForCategories
template.description: Halts execution unless the current channel belongs to one of the specified category IDs.

template.name: ZonlyForChannels
template.description: Halts execution unless the current channel matches one of the specified channel IDs.

template.name: ZonlyForIDs
template.description: Halts execution unless the author's user ID matches one of the specified IDs.

template.name: ZonlyForRoleIDs
template.description: Halts execution unless the author has at least one of the specified role IDs.

template.name: ZonlyForRoles
template.description: Halts execution unless the author has at least one of the specified roles matched by name.

template.name: ZonlyForServers
template.description: Halts execution unless the current guild ID matches one of the specified server IDs.

template.name: ZonlyForUsers
template.description: Halts execution unless the author's username matches one of the specified usernames.

template.name: ZonlyIf
template.description: Halts execution with a custom error message if the given condition evaluates to false.

template.name: ZonlyIfMessageContains
template.description: Halts execution with an error message unless the provided message text contains all of the specified words.

template.name: ZonlyNSFW
template.description: Halts execution unless the current channel is marked as NSFW.

template.name: ZonlyPerms
template.description: Halts execution unless the author has all of the specified guild permissions.

template.name: Zoption
template.description: Returns the value of a named slash command option by its key.

template.name: ZpadLeft
template.description: Pads the text on the left with a repeated character until it reaches the specified width, defaulting to a space.

template.name: ZpadRight
template.description: Pads the text on the right with a repeated character until it reaches the specified width, defaulting to a space.

template.name: ZparentID
template.description: Returns the ID of the parent category of the given channel, or an empty string if the channel has no parent.

template.name: Zping
template.description: Returns the bot's gateway latency in milliseconds.

template.name: ZpinList
template.description: Returns a space-separated list of pinned message IDs in a channel.

template.name: ZpinMessage
template.description: Pins the specified message in a channel, defaulting to the current channel if no channel ID is provided.

template.name: ZpollAddAnswer
template.description: Adds an answer option to the poll being created.

template.name: ZpollAllowMultiselect
template.description: Allows voting for multiple answers in the poll being created.

template.name: ZpollAnswerVoters
template.description: Returns a list of users who voted for a specific poll answer.

template.name: ZpollAnswerVotes
template.description: Returns the vote count for a specific poll answer.

template.name: ZpollCreate
template.description: Starts creating a poll with the given question and duration in hours.

template.name: ZpollEnd
template.description: Ends a poll early by message ID.

template.name: ZpollGet
template.description: Gets poll details and current results for a message.

template.name: ZpollSend
template.description: Sends the configured poll to the specified channel.

template.name: ZpostTags
template.description: Returns a space-separated list of tag IDs currently applied to a forum post thread.

template.name: Zpow
template.description: Returns the base raised to the power of the exponent.

template.name: ZpublishMessage
template.description: Crossposts a message from an announcement channel to all subscribed channels.

template.name: Zrandom
template.description: Returns a random integer between min and max (inclusive).

template.name: ZrandomCategoryID
template.description: Returns the ID of a randomly selected category channel in the current server.

template.name: ZrandomChannelID
template.description: Returns the ID of a randomly selected text channel in the current server.

template.name: ZrandomGuildID
template.description: Returns the ID of a randomly selected guild that the bot is a member of.

template.name: ZrandomMention
template.description: Returns a formatted mention string for a randomly selected member in the current server.

template.name: ZrandomRoleID
template.description: Returns the ID of a randomly selected role in the current server.

template.name: ZrandomString
template.description: Returns a random alphanumeric string of the specified length.

template.name: ZrandomText
template.description: Returns one of the provided text values chosen at random.

template.name: ZrandomUser
template.description: Returns the display name of a randomly selected member in the current server.

template.name: ZrandomUserID
template.description: Returns the user ID of a randomly selected member in the current server.

template.name: ZregexMatch
template.description: Returns true if the text matches the given regular expression pattern.

template.name: ZregexReplace
template.description: Replaces all substrings in the text that match the regular expression pattern with the specified replacement.

template.name: ZremoveAllComponents
template.description: Removes all components from a message, defaulting to the triggering message.

template.name: ZremoveButtons
template.description: Removes all buttons from a message by clearing all its components, defaulting to the triggering message.

template.name: ZremoveComponent
template.description: Removes a specific component by its custom ID from a message, defaulting to the triggering message.

template.name: ZremoveEmoji
template.description: Deletes a custom emoji from the current server by its ID.

template.name: ZremoveLinks
template.description: Removes all whitespace-delimited tokens beginning with http:// or https:// from the text.

template.name: ZremoveSplitTextElement
template.description: Removes the element at the given 1-based index from the current split text.

template.name: Zrepeat
template.description: Executes the given code block N times and returns each non-empty output joined by newlines.

template.name: ZreplaceText
template.description: Replaces occurrences of a sample substring in text with a new string, with an optional limit on the number of replacements.

template.name: ZrepliedMessageID
template.description: Returns the ID of the message that the specified or triggering message is replying to.

template.name: Zreply
template.description: Signals that the bot's response should be sent as a reply to the triggering message.

template.name: ZreplyIn
template.description: Schedules a reply to the triggering message after the specified duration has elapsed.

template.name: ZresetChannelVar
template.description: Deletes the given channel variable across every channel.

template.name: ZresetServerVar
template.description: Deletes the given server variable across every server.

template.name: ZresetUserVar
template.description: Deletes the given user variable for every user in the current server.

template.name: ZroleColor
template.description: Returns the hex color code of a role, defaulting to the author's top role if no ID is provided.

template.name: ZroleCount
template.description: Returns the total number of roles in the current guild.

template.name: ZroleExists
template.description: Returns true if the given role ID exists in the guild, defaulting to the author's top role if no ID is provided.

template.name: ZroleGrant
template.description: Grants or removes one or more roles from a user using prefixed operations where + adds and - removes a role.

template.name: ZroleID
template.description: Returns the command author's top role ID, or searches for and returns the ID of a guild role matching the given name.

template.name: ZroleMemberCount
template.description: Returns the number of members who have the given role, defaulting to the author's highest role.

template.name: ZroleMembers
template.description: Returns a space-separated list of user IDs for all members who have the given role, defaulting to the author's highest role.

template.name: ZroleName
template.description: Returns the name of a role by its ID, defaulting to the author's top role if no ID is provided.

template.name: ZroleNames
template.description: Returns all role names in the guild sorted by position from highest to lowest, joined by the given separator.

template.name: ZrolePerms
template.description: Returns the permission names granted to a role joined by the given separator, defaulting to the author's top role if no ID is provided.

template.name: ZrolePosition
template.description: Returns the hierarchy position of a role, defaulting to the author's top role if no ID is provided.

template.name: Zround
template.description: Rounds a number to the specified number of decimal places, defaulting to zero decimal places.

template.name: ZrulesChannelID
template.description: Returns the ID of the rules channel in the guild, or an empty string if none is configured.

template.name: Zsecond
template.description: Returns the current second using the active timezone.

template.name: ZsendEmbed
template.description: Sends the embed at the specified slot index to a Discord channel, optionally returning the sent message ID.

template.name: ZsendMessage
template.description: Sends a message to the specified channel (or the current channel if omitted), and optionally returns the sent message's ID.

template.name: ZsendWebhook
template.description: Sends the embed at the specified slot index via a Discord webhook URL, optionally returning the message ID.

template.name: ZserverChannels
template.description: Returns a separator-joined list of channel IDs for the specified server.

template.name: ZserverCooldown
template.description: Applies a server-wide cooldown that prevents anyone in the server from running the command until the duration expires.

template.name: ZserverCount
template.description: Returns the number of guilds the bot is currently in.

template.name: ZserverDescription
template.description: Returns the description of the guild, or an empty string if none is set.

template.name: ZserverEmojis
template.description: Returns the custom emojis of the guild as formatted emoji strings joined by the specified separator.

template.name: ZserverEvents
template.description: Returns a space-separated list of all scheduled event IDs in the current server.

template.name: ZserverIcon
template.description: Returns the icon URL of the guild, or an empty string if no icon is set.

template.name: ZserverInvite
template.description: Returns the URL of the first available invite for the guild, or an empty string if none exist.

template.name: ZserverLockdown
template.description: Enables or disables guild raid protection (incident actions) with an optional duration.

template.name: ZserverModify
template.description: Edits guild settings such as name, icon, banner, splash, description, and verification level.

template.name: ZserverName
template.description: Returns the name of the guild.

template.name: ZserverNames
template.description: Returns a list of the names of all guilds the bot is in, optionally limited to a count and joined by the separator.

template.name: ZserverOwner
template.description: Returns the user ID of the guild owner.

template.name: ZserverRoles
template.description: Returns a separator-joined list of role IDs for the specified server.

template.name: ZserverStickers
template.description: Returns a space-separated list of all sticker IDs in the current server.

template.name: ZserverVerificationLevel
template.description: Returns the verification level of the current guild as a string such as none, low, medium, high, or very_high.

template.name: ZsetChannelVar
template.description: Sets the value of a channel-scoped variable, defaulting to the current channel if not specified.

template.name: ZsetPostTags
template.description: Replaces all applied tags on a forum post thread with the specified tag IDs.

template.name: ZsetServerVar
template.description: Sets the value of a server-scoped variable, defaulting to the current server if not specified.

template.name: ZsetUserRoles
template.description: Replaces all roles of the specified user with exactly the provided list of role IDs.

template.name: ZsetUserVar
template.description: Sets the value of a user-scoped variable, defaulting to the current user and server if not specified.

template.name: ZsetVar
template.description: Sets the value of a global bot-wide variable by name.

template.name: Zsha256
template.description: Returns the SHA-256 hash of the input text as a hex string.

template.name: Zskus
template.description: Returns the bot application's SKUs as a JSON array.

template.name: ZslashCommandsCount
template.description: Returns the number of slash-type commands loaded from the commands directory.

template.name: ZslashID
template.description: Returns the Discord application command ID for the specified slash command name, or for the currently executing slash command if no name is provided.

template.name: ZslowMode
template.description: Sets the slowmode rate limit on a channel to the specified duration (0 or 0s disables it).

template.name: Zsort
template.description: Sorts a variadic list of numbers in ascending or descending order and returns up to a specified count joined by a separator.

template.name: ZsoundboardCreate
template.description: Uploads a new sound to the server soundboard from a file URL.

template.name: ZsoundboardDefaultSounds
template.description: Lists Discord's default soundboard sounds.

template.name: ZsoundboardDelete
template.description: Deletes a sound from the server soundboard.

template.name: ZsoundboardEdit
template.description: Edits a soundboard sound's name, volume, or emoji.

template.name: ZsoundboardPlay
template.description: Plays a soundboard sound in a voice channel.

template.name: ZsoundboardSound
template.description: Gets details of a specific soundboard sound.

template.name: ZsoundboardSounds
template.description: Lists all soundboard sounds in the server.

template.name: ZspliceText
template.description: Modifies a string by removing a specified number of characters starting at a 1-based position and inserting a replacement string in their place.

template.name: ZsplitText
template.description: Returns a single element from the stored split text by 1-based index, or use < for the first or > for the last element.

template.name: Zsqrt
template.description: Returns the square root of the given non-negative number.

template.name: ZstageCreate
template.description: Creates a new stage instance in the specified stage channel with the given topic.

template.name: ZstageDelete
template.description: Ends and deletes the stage instance associated with the specified stage channel.

template.name: ZstageEdit
template.description: Edits the topic of an existing stage instance in the specified stage channel.

template.name: ZstageTopic
template.description: Returns the current topic of the stage instance in the specified stage channel.

template.name: ZstartsWith
template.description: Returns true if the text begins with the specified prefix.

template.name: ZstartThread
template.description: Creates a new thread in the specified channel, optionally attaching it to an existing message, and returns the thread ID if requested.

template.name: ZstickerCount
template.description: Returns the total number of stickers in the current server.

template.name: ZstickerCreate
template.description: Creates a new guild sticker from a file URL.

template.name: ZstickerDescription
template.description: Returns the description of a guild sticker by its sticker ID, or an empty string if no description is set.

template.name: ZstickerEdit
template.description: Edits a guild sticker's metadata. Use !unchanged for fields to skip.

template.name: ZstickerEmoji
template.description: Returns the related emoji tag for a guild sticker as a string.

template.name: ZstickerExists
template.description: Returns true if a sticker with the given ID exists in the current server, or false otherwise.

template.name: ZstickerID
template.description: Returns the ID of a guild sticker matching the given name, or an empty string if not found.

template.name: ZstickerName
template.description: Returns the name of a guild sticker by its sticker ID.

template.name: Zstop
template.description: Halts execution silently without producing any output or error message.

template.name: Zsub
template.description: Subtracts each subsequent number from the first value and returns the result.

template.name: Zsubstring
template.description: Returns a portion of the text starting at a 1-based character position, optionally limited to a specified length.

template.name: Zsum
template.description: Returns the sum of all provided numbers.

template.name: ZsuppressErrors
template.description: Activates error suppression for the current execution, optionally showing a custom message or a specific embed slot instead of the real error.

template.name: ZsyncPerms
template.description: Syncs a channel's permissions with its parent category.

template.name: ZsystemChannelID
template.description: Returns the ID of the system messages channel in the current guild, or an empty string if none is configured.

template.name: ZtextSplit
template.description: Splits a string by a separator and stores the resulting elements for use with other split functions.

template.name: ZthreadAddMember
template.description: Adds a user to the specified thread by their user ID.

template.name: ZthreadArchive
template.description: Archives a thread by its ID.

template.name: ZthreadArchived
template.description: Returns true if the thread is archived.

template.name: ZthreadList
template.description: Lists threads in a channel. active: true/false. private: true=private archived, false=public archived.

template.name: ZthreadLocked
template.description: Returns true if the thread is locked.

template.name: ZthreadMessageCount
template.description: Returns the number of messages in the specified thread.

template.name: ZthreadMetadata
template.description: Returns JSON metadata for a thread including owner, creation date, and flags.

template.name: ZthreadParentID
template.description: Returns the parent channel ID of the thread, or empty string.

template.name: ZthreadPin
template.description: Pins a thread to the top of its parent channel.

template.name: ZthreadRemoveMember
template.description: Removes a user from the specified thread by their user ID.

template.name: ZthreadUnarchive
template.description: Unarchives a thread by its ID.

template.name: ZthreadUserCount
template.description: Returns the total number of members currently in the specified thread.

template.name: Zthumbnail
template.description: Sets the thumbnail image URL on the specified embed slot.

template.name: Ztime
template.description: Sets the active timezone for all subsequent date/time functions, or returns the current timezone name when called with no argument.

template.name: ZtimeDiff
template.description: Returns the absolute difference between two Unix timestamps in the specified unit such as seconds, minutes, hours, or days.

template.name: Ztimeout
template.description: Applies a communication timeout to a user for the specified duration, up to a maximum of 28 days.

template.name: Ztimestamp
template.description: Enables the current UTC timestamp display on the specified embed slot.

template.name: Ztitle
template.description: Sets the title text on the specified embed slot.

template.name: Ztitlecase
template.description: Converts the first letter of each word to uppercase and all remaining letters to lowercase.

template.name: ZtitleURL
template.description: Sets a hyperlink URL on the embed's title, requiring a title to already be set on that slot.

template.name: ZtrimContent
template.description: Collapses multiple consecutive spaces into a single space and trims leading and trailing whitespace.

template.name: ZtrimSpace
template.description: Removes leading and trailing whitespace from the text.

template.name: ZtryRun
template.description: Evaluates the code block and falls back to the fallback block if any error occurs.

template.name: Zunban
template.description: Removes the ban for the specified user from the guild.

template.name: Zundeafen
template.description: Removes the server deafen from the specified user so they can hear audio in voice channels again.

template.name: Zunmute
template.description: Removes the server mute from the specified user in all voice channels.

template.name: ZunpinMessage
template.description: Unpins the specified message in a channel, defaulting to the current channel if no channel ID is provided.

template.name: ZuntimeOut
template.description: Removes the active communication timeout from a user, restoring their ability to send messages.

template.name: Zupdate
template.description: Signals that the interaction response should update the original message instead of sending a new reply. Only valid inside interaction handlers (buttons, select menus).

template.name: Zuppercase
template.description: Converts all characters in the text to uppercase.

template.name: Zuptime
template.description: Returns the bot's uptime since startup, formatted as a human-readable string of days, hours, minutes, and seconds.

template.name: Zurl
template.description: Encodes or decodes a string using URL percent-encoding based on the specified mode.

template.name: ZuseChannel
template.description: Redirects all bot output for the current command execution to the specified channel.

template.name: ZuserAvatar
template.description: Returns the avatar URL of the command author, or of the specified user if a user ID is provided.

template.name: ZuserBadge
template.description: Returns the public profile badges of the command author or specified user as a separated list.

template.name: ZuserBanner
template.description: Returns the banner URL of the command author or specified user, or an empty string if no banner is set.

template.name: ZuserBannerColor
template.description: Returns the banner accent color of the command author or specified user as a hex string, or an empty string if none is set.

template.name: ZuserExists
template.description: Returns true if the given user ID resolves to a valid Discord user, or false otherwise.

template.name: ZuserID
template.description: Returns the command author's user ID, or searches for and returns the user ID of a guild member matching the given name.

template.name: ZuserJoined
template.description: Returns the date when the command author or specified user joined the current guild, formatted according to the optional format string.

template.name: Zusername
template.description: Returns the username of the command author, or of the specified user if a user ID is provided.

template.name: ZuserPerms
template.description: Returns the guild permissions held by the command author or specified user, up to the given amount, joined by the separator.

template.name: ZuserReacted
template.description: Returns true if the specified user reacted to a message with the given emoji, or false otherwise.

template.name: ZuserRoles
template.description: Returns a list of the specified user's roles joined by the given separator, with output format controlled by returnType.

template.name: ZuserSelfDeafened
template.description: Returns true if the specified user has deafened themselves in voice, defaulting to the author.

template.name: ZuserSelfMuted
template.description: Returns true if the specified user has muted themselves in voice, defaulting to the author.

template.name: ZuserServerAvatar
template.description: Returns the guild-specific avatar URL of the command author or specified user, falling back to their global avatar or default avatar if none is set.

template.name: ZuserServerDeafened
template.description: Returns true if the specified user has been server-deafened by a moderator, defaulting to the author.

template.name: ZuserServerMuted
template.description: Returns true if the specified user has been server-muted by a moderator, defaulting to the author.

template.name: ZuserStatus
template.description: Returns the online status of the command author or specified user, or their custom status text if customStatus is true.

template.name: ZuserStreaming
template.description: Returns true if the specified user is currently streaming in a voice channel, defaulting to the author.

template.name: ZuserVoiceChannel
template.description: Returns the ID of the voice channel the specified user is in, or an empty string if they are not in voice.

template.name: Zvar
template.description: Gets or sets a temporary in-memory variable that persists only for the duration of the current command execution.

template.name: ZvarExistError
template.description: Halts execution with a custom error message if the specified global variable does not exist.

template.name: ZvarExists
template.description: Returns true if a global variable with the given name exists, otherwise returns false.

template.name: ZvoiceBitrate
template.description: Returns the bitrate in kbps of the specified voice channel, defaulting to the author's current voice channel.

template.name: ZvoiceEmpty
template.description: Returns true if the specified voice channel has zero members; defaults to the author's current voice channel.

template.name: ZvoiceFull
template.description: Returns true if the specified voice channel's member count equals its user limit; defaults to the author's current voice channel.

template.name: ZvoiceKick
template.description: Disconnects the specified user from their current voice channel.

template.name: ZvoiceMemberCount
template.description: Returns the number of users currently in the specified voice channel, defaulting to the author's current voice channel.

template.name: ZvoiceMembers
template.description: Returns a space-separated list of user IDs currently in the specified voice channel, defaulting to the author's current voice channel.

template.name: ZvoiceMove
template.description: Moves a user from their current voice channel to the specified target voice channel.

template.name: ZvoiceNew
template.description: Returns the new voice channel ID from the onVoiceStateUpdate event context (the channel the user moved to).

template.name: ZvoiceOld
template.description: Returns the previous voice channel ID from the onVoiceStateUpdate event context (the channel the user was in before).

template.name: ZvoiceRequestToSpeak
template.description: Requests to speak in a stage channel, or cancels the request if cancel=true.

template.name: ZvoiceStatus
template.description: Gets or sets the status of a voice channel. Returns the current status if no status arg is given.

template.name: ZvoiceSuppress
template.description: Suppress or unsuppress a user in a stage channel.

template.name: ZvoiceUserLimit
template.description: Returns the maximum number of users allowed in a voice or stage channel, or 0 if there is no limit.

template.name: ZwebhookCreate
template.description: Creates a webhook in the specified channel and returns its full URL.

template.name: ZwebhookDelete
template.description: Deletes a webhook identified by its full Discord webhook URL.

template.name: ZwelcomeScreen
template.description: Returns the guild's welcome screen as a JSON object.

template.name: Zyear
template.description: Returns the current four-digit year using the active timezone.
